We are looking for a Mid React Developer to join our product engineering team. The role focuses on building user-facing features for a cloud platform used by enterprise customers across Europe.

The ideal candidate has practical experience with React, TypeScript, JavaScript, REST APIs and automated testing. Familiarity with AWS or Docker is a plus. You will collaborate with designers, backend engineers and product managers to deliver reliable frontend solutions.

The position is fully remote. The preferred contract is employment contract. Salary range is 18 000 - 22 000 PLN gross per month. Good English communication skills are required.
